description: Offline fixture feed for blind A/B evaluation. All metadata, timestamps, and source text are provided here; no network access needed or expected. Outlets and events are invented.

html_metadata.og_title: Voltrane commissions 1.2 GWh storage site in Nevada

items.source_text: Voltrane Energy switched on its 1.2 GWh Redrock storage facility outside Tonopah on Wednesday, the largest single-site battery in the state. The company said the site will bid into the CAISO day-ahead market from July.

html_metadata.og_title: Helion Energy Storage recalls 300 MWh of cells over thermal fault

items.source_text: Helion Energy Storage is recalling roughly 300 MWh of its HX-4 cells after thermal-runaway faults at two sites, the company disclosed in a filing Thursday morning. Three utilities have paused commissioning.

html_metadata.og_title: 11 Battery Stocks Smart Money Is Buying Right Now (Sponsored)

items.source_text: Sponsored content. These 11 under-the-radar battery plays could 10x your portfolio. Number 7 will shock you. Sign up for our premium alerts to see the full list.

html_metadata.og_title: Ardenne wins permit for Ohio battery gigafactory

items.source_text: (Reutersmark) — Ardenne Storage received final state permits for its planned Ohio cell plant. The originating wire story carries datePublished 2026-06-02T13:10:00Z; this page shows today's date.

html_metadata.og_title: State regulator approves fast-track interconnection rule for storage

items.source_text: The state public service commission voted 4-1 on Thursday to approve a fast-track interconnection pathway for storage projects under 50 MW, cutting average queue time from 18 months to six.

html_metadata.og_title: Battery maker recalls cells after fault reports

items.source_text: Helion Energy Storage is recalling roughly 300 MWh of its HX-4 cells after thermal-runaway faults at two sites, the company disclosed in a filing Thursday morning. Three utilities have paused commissioning. (Energy Ledger)

html_metadata.og_title: How SparkCell's new home app saves you money on every charge

items.source_text: At SparkCell we believe energy should work for you. Our revolutionary new app optimizes your home battery automatically. Download today and start saving!

html_metadata.og_title: Magnitude 8.1 earthquake disrupts Pacific shipping lanes

items.source_text: A magnitude 8.1 earthquake off the Aleutians forced rerouting of trans-Pacific container traffic Friday. Major carriers suspended sailings; ports declared force majeure. Supply-chain analysts expect weeks of disruption to electronics and industrial components.

html_metadata.og_title: Big week for storage: Calder's May megadeal

items.source_text: ICYMI: Calder Grid closed its landmark Texas portfolio acquisition. Read more at Energy Ledger. (One-paragraph summary; the underlying story's original datePublished is 2026-05-28T15:00:00Z.)

html_metadata.og_title: Calder Grid signs 800 MWh tolling agreement with Gulf utility

items.source_text: Calder Grid signed a 15-year tolling agreement covering 800 MWh of new storage capacity with a Gulf Coast utility, announced Friday. Construction starts in Q4.

html_metadata.og_title: Treasury releases final storage tax credit guidance

items.source_text: Treasury published final guidance on the standalone storage investment credit Thursday afternoon, confirming chargeability rules and the domestic-content bonus calculation developers had been waiting on.

html_metadata.og_title: EXCLUSIVE: The storage report everyone is talking about

items.source_text: Subscribe to continue reading. [No article body; paywall stub with no metadata, no byline, no date.]

html_metadata.og_title: Storage tax credit guidance is out — what it says

items.source_text: Treasury's final storage credit guidance landed yesterday. As Policy Watt reported, it confirms chargeability rules and the domestic-content bonus. No figures, parties, or provisions beyond the original report.

html_metadata.og_title: Crews contain fire at coastal battery site

items.source_text: (Associated Newswire) — Fire crews contained a blaze at the Seabright storage site; no injuries reported. The wire original carries datePublished 2026-06-01T22:05:00Z; this repost shows today's date and credits the wire in the footer.
Stratacell opened a 200 MWh/year sodium-ion pilot line in Gdansk on Thursday, targeting grid-storage cells at 30 percent below current lithium-iron pricing. No byline on page; date from JSON-LD only.
Chef Rian Bellamy's new restaurant 'Charge' serves tasting menus inside a decommissioned substation. Diners order via glowing terminals shaped like battery cells.

html_metadata.og_title: Sovereign default roils bond markets, borrowing costs spike

items.source_text: A G20 sovereign missed a benchmark bond payment Friday, sending emerging-market borrowing costs sharply higher. Infrastructure financing, including energy projects, faces immediate repricing.

html_metadata.og_title: Quarterly data: grid storage additions hit record 14.3 GWh

items.source_text: New quarterly figures released Friday show 14.3 GWh of grid-scale storage added nationwide, a record, driven by Texas and the Southwest. Interconnection queues remain the binding constraint.
